data_source_before: Server-side file read from data/mock/gridflex_demo_response.json via apps/ui/src/lib/demo-data.ts.
data_source_after: Server-side API-first fetch from /api/v1/demo using http://scan-12.local:8000 by default, with localhost fallback only if needed and the existing mock JSON as the final fallback.

kpi_mapping.jobs_total: data.kpis.jobs_total, shown in the 'Jobs shifted' ratio card
kpi_mapping.jobs_shifted: data.kpis.jobs_shifted, shown in the 'Jobs shifted' ratio card
kpi_mapping.jobs_admitted_now: data.kpis.jobs_admitted_now, shown in the 'Jobs admitted now' card
kpi_mapping.deadline_miss_rate: data.kpis.deadline_miss_rate, shown in the 'Deadline miss rate' card
kpi_mapping.gpu_utilisation_preserved_pct: data.kpis.gpu_utilisation_preserved_pct, shown in the 'GPU utilisation preserved' card
kpi_mapping.peak_kwh_avoided: data.kpis.peak_kwh_avoided, shown in the 'Peak kWh avoided' card
kpi_mapping.mean_grid_stress_before: data.kpis.mean_grid_stress_before, shown in the 'Mean stress before' card
kpi_mapping.mean_grid_stress_after: data.kpis.mean_grid_stress_after, shown in the 'Mean stress after' card
kpi_mapping.estimated_carbon_saving_kgco2: data.kpis.estimated_carbon_saving_kgco2, shown in the 'Carbon saved' card

grid_window_mapping.timestamp: data.grid_windows[].timestamp, used for bar keys and time labels in the timeline
grid_window_mapping.grid_stress_score: data.grid_windows[].grid_stress_score, used for bar heights and tooltips
grid_window_mapping.stress_band: data.grid_windows[].stress_band, used for bar color classes
grid_window_mapping.predicted_stress_band: Available in the live payload and typed in the frontend, but not yet rendered as a distinct visual element

decision_mapping.job_id: data.decisions[].job_id, used in the decision table and explanation panel
decision_mapping.decision: data.decisions[].decision, used in the decision table and workload table badges
decision_mapping.delay_minutes: data.decisions[].delay_minutes, used in the decision table and explanation panel heading
decision_mapping.grid_stress_before: data.decisions[].grid_stress_before, shown in the decision table
decision_mapping.grid_stress_after: data.decisions[].grid_stress_after, shown in the decision table
decision_mapping.reason_code: data.decisions[].reason_code, shown in the decision table
decision_mapping.nim_explanation: data.decisions[].nim_explanation, shown in the explanation panel

missing_backend_fields: grid_windows[].predicted_stress_band is not yet rendered as a separate badge or chart layer
grid_windows[].zone is not surfaced in the dashboard
grid_windows[].carbon_intensity_gco2_kwh is not surfaced in the dashboard
grid_windows[].tariff_p_per_kwh is not surfaced in the dashboard
grid_windows[].flexibility_event is not surfaced in the dashboard
grid_windows[].source is not surfaced in the dashboard
workloads[].submitted_at is not surfaced in the dashboard
workloads[].duration_minutes is not surfaced in the dashboard
workloads[].estimated_energy_kwh is not surfaced in the dashboard
workloads[].urgency_class is not surfaced in the dashboard
workloads[].deadline_at is not surfaced in the dashboard
decisions[].original_start is not surfaced in the dashboard
decisions[].scheduled_start is only surfaced indirectly in the workload table
decisions[].estimated_energy_kwh is not surfaced in the dashboard
decisions[].estimated_peak_kwh_avoided is not surfaced in the dashboard
non_blocking_issues: npm install modified apps/ui/package-lock.json even though no dependency changes were required for the API wiring
next build emits a non-blocking Turbopack NFT tracing warning related to filesystem-based mock fallback loading
The dev server started on port 3001 because port 3000 was already in use locally
recommended_next_action: Review whether Madhav wants the currently unrendered grid-window metadata and decision energy fields surfaced before opening a merge request; the API integration itself is working and merge-safe.
